subtasks.description: Extract AWS Savings Plans and Reserved Instance commitments from AWS billing/procurement data
Extract actual AWS spending data from cost and usage reports for comparison period
Normalize commitment levels and spending data by service, region, instance type, and time period for accurate comparison
Calculate variance between committed vs actual spend, identify overcommitment (commits > spend) and underutilization (unused commit capacity)
Generate key metrics: commitment coverage ratio, utilization rate, cost avoidance achieved, and forecast future needs
Produce comprehensive reconciliation report with findings, visualizations of gaps, and recommendations for commitment adjustments
Generate policy recommendations for optimizing commitment levels based on utilization patterns and spending trends

plan.cost_rationale: Frontier tier needed for strategic policy recommendations requiring complex analysis of commitment optimization strategies. Mid-tier agents handle data extraction, normalization, analysis and reporting. Small tier for straightforward data extraction tasks.

output.sql:
SELECT
  cf.publisher,
  cf.product,
  cf.fiscal_year,
  cf.fiscal_quarter,

  -- Commitment Coverage Ratio: invoiced (committed) amount vs actual consumption
  SUM(inv.amount_usd) AS total_committed_usd,
  SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_actual_usd,

  ROUND(
    SUM(inv.amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(cf.amount_usd), 0),
    4
  ) AS commitment_coverage_ratio,

  -- Utilization Rate: actual spend as % of committed
  ROUND(
    SUM(cf.amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(inv.amount_usd), 0) * 100,
    2
  ) AS utilization_rate_pct,

  -- Cost Avoidance: how much committed spend exceeded actual (savings from commitment pricing)
  GREATEST(SUM(inv.amount_usd) - SUM(cf.amount_usd), 0) AS cost_avoidance_usd,

  -- Overrun: actual spend exceeding commitment (undercommitment)
  GREATEST(SUM(cf.amount_usd) - SUM(inv.amount_usd), 0) AS commitment_overrun_usd,

  -- Average Daily Active Seats for capacity/forecast signal
  ROUND(AVG(cf.daily_active_seats), 2) AS avg_daily_active_seats,

  -- Forecast Future Needs: project next period spend based on trailing trend
  ROUND(
    SUM(cf.amount_usd) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_date), 0) * 90,
    2
  ) AS forecasted_next_quarter_spend_usd,

  -- Commitment status classification
  CASE
    WHEN SUM(inv.amount_usd) > SUM(cf.amount_usd) * 1.10 THEN 'overcommitted'
    WHEN SUM(cf.amount_usd) > SUM(inv.amount_usd) * 1.10 THEN 'undercommitted'
    ELSE 'balanced'
  END AS commitment_status

FROM consumption_facts cf
INNER JOIN invoice_facts inv
  ON cf.license_id = inv.contract_id
  AND cf.publisher = inv.vendor_name

WHERE
  cf.event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
  AND inv.invoice_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
  AND inv.status IN ('paid', 'approved', 'pending')

GROUP BY
  cf.publisher,
  cf.product,
  cf.fiscal_year,
  cf.fiscal_quarter

ORDER BY
  cf.fiscal_year DESC,
  cf.fiscal_quarter DESC,
  total_actual_usd DESC
